message:
test(ext-conformance): unignore community test, separate TS oracle failures (bd-2ru2)

Remove #[ignore] from diff_community_manifest now that all Rust-side failures
are fixed. Partition failures into ts_oracle_failed vs rust_runtime_failed and
only assert on Rust failures. The 5 TS oracle failures are environmental
issues (missing native modules, files, or shared modules) that can't be fixed
from the Rust side.

Results: 53/53 testable pass (100%), 5 TS oracle skipped, 60/60 official pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
